name: Altergeist Emulatelf
name_jp: オルターガイスト・エミュレルフ
desc: Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster (Spellcaster/LIGHT/Level 4/ATK 1400/DEF 1800). (This card is also still a Trap.) If Summoned this way, while it is in the Monster Zone, other "Altergeist" Traps you control cannot be destroyed by card effects, also neither player can target them with card effects.
eff: Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster (Spellcaster/LIGHT/Level 4/ATK 1400/DEF 1800). (This card is also still a Trap.) If Summoned this way, while it is in the Monster Zone, other "Altergeist" Traps you control cannot be destroyed by card effects, also neither player can target them with card effects.

mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
